timing_poor.seeker: Pursuing promotions, switching jobs, or negotiating salary — effort outweighs returns right now, wait for better timing

suitable.hr: Suitable for business development roles (Sales Director, Account Manager, Business Development)

remedy.principle: Act boldly — the timing is right

remedy.hr: This person is in their peak period. Give them room and resources, and they will deliver beyond expectations. Suitable for core responsibilities.

栄.summary: A great time for bold action — promotions, proposals, and business development will pay off

suitable.seeker: Solve existing problems, remove obstacles, ensure quality, fix bugs

suitable.seeker: Get certifications, take courses, organize your portfolio, learn new technologies

timing_poor.seeker: Switching jobs, changing careers, or relocating — adaptation will be difficult, effort outweighs returns
timing_poor.hr: Frequent transfers are ineffective for this person; let them settle and deepen their expertise at a fixed location

timing_poor.seeker: Taking on contracts, negotiating deals, or quoting prices — deals are prone to falling through or being undercut
timing_poor.hr: External procurement or contract negotiations will yield limited results; assign internal execution tasks instead

remedy.principle: Build from within, accumulate capital for the next wave
remedy.seeker: Redirect your energy from outward expansion to inward growth. Contract negotiations are poorly timed right now, but getting certified or learning new skills is ideal. What you build now will serve you well when the next favorable period arrives.
remedy.hr: Place in problem-solving or quality assurance roles with an internal training plan. This person excels at resolving existing issues and delivers consistently at a fixed location.

suitable.seeker: Target companies implementing new systems; highlight your experience in process development
suitable.hr: System establishment and process planning roles (ISO Implementation, SOP Development, Compliance Management)

remedy.principle: Settle in and build a solid foundation
remedy.seeker: This is a great time to establish roots. Relocations, transfers, and joining new teams will go smoothly. Target companies that are expanding — your ability to build stability is exactly what they need.
remedy.hr: This person is worth long-term investment. They adapt quickly after joining. Roles that involve establishing new locations or systems will bring out their best.

timing_poor.hr: Frequent travel assignments are ineffective; let this person leverage their social skills within the office

timing_poor.seeker: Major contract negotiations or large purchases — deals tend to stall
timing_poor.hr: Major contract negotiations will yield limited results; assign to day-to-day operational work

壊.summary: Excels at tackling tough problems and crisis response; performs best in challenging environments
